center.name: 聖馬丁德洛斯安第斯
center.summary: 聖馬丁德洛斯安第斯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Magellanic tapaculo，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Magellanic tapaculo (Scytalopus magellanicus) is a small passerine bird in the tapaculo family Rhinocryptidae that is found in southern South America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Magellanic tapaculo (Scytalopus magellanicus) is a small passerine bird in the tapaculo family Rhinocryptidae that is found in southern South America
